name: Chelsea Piers Golf Club
about: Chelsea Piers Golf Club is a premier indoor golf entertainment venue located in New York City. It features a state-of-the-art golf simulator environment combined with the social atmosphere of a sports bar and grill. The facility offers golfers the opportunity to play world-famous courses and analyze their swing with advanced technology, regardless of the weather outside. The venue caters to both serious golfers looking to improve their game and casual visitors seeking a unique entertainment experience. It provides a full-service dining menu and an extensive selection of beers and wines, making it a popular destination for social outings, corporate events, and private parties.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf regardless of weather
Advanced swing analysis and simulation technology
Full restaurant and bar service available in bays
Versatile venue for social and corporate events
Professional instruction and custom club fitting

food_and_drink.notes: American grill menu served directly to the bays
Full bar with wine and beer selections

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you do not need to bring your own clubs. Chelsea Piers provides premium club rentals for men, women, and left-handed players at no additional cost.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. However, the venue offers a full-service kitchen and bar with a diverse menu that can be enjoyed directly in the hitting bays.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round on the simulator typically takes about one hour to play, making it a convenient option for a quick game after work or during a lunch break.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chelsea Piers Golf Club is kid-friendly. The simulators are easy to use, and the venue offers club rentals for juniors, making it a fun activity for the whole family.
